_comment: sparkdistill scoring intent for SN74 / Gittensor. SN74 pays VERIFIED DISTILLATION QUALITY IMPROVEMENT ONLY. This file is documentation - the live payout is fixed_base_score x label_multiplier from the org config (master_repositories.json), not this file.
scoring: Each merged PR scores fixed_base_score (1.0) x its quality tier label. Training-track eval:* tiers pay 2x the dataset:* tier at the same letter (XS/S/M/L/XL). BASELINE (first verified checkpoint on a new student/phase) pays 2.0. A verified quality improvement is scored the same wherever it lands (teacher / recipes / eval) - there is no per-subsystem emission budget.

label_multipliers._comment: Live values in gittensor master_repositories.json (gittensor-model-hub/SparkDistill). Payout = fixed_base_score (1.0) x multiplier x time_decay.

non_quality_prs: Welcome, but score 0. Correct-but-not-better (eval:none), tooling, benchmarks, docs, and refactors earn no SN74 emission. The eval/scoring harness is maintainer-owned (see CONTRIBUTING.md).

areas._comment: Categorization only - drives the deterministic area:* labels for display, NOT emission weights.
areas.teacher: teacher-trajectory generation, sampling, and provider integrations
areas.recipes: Axolotl training recipes - data mix, hyperparameters, adapter config
areas.eval: benchmark harness + eval scoring + cheap proof verification (harness scripts are maintainer-owned)
areas.proof: GPU confidential-computing attestation + Hugging Face proof-bundle packaging/publishing

notes: Tiers are maturity-adaptive: as a student checkpoint nears its teacher's benchmark ceiling, improvement is scored vs remaining headroom. Full reward model: https://github.com/gittensor-ai-lab
